title: Point Blank Official || Gun Gale Pack
description: Official Vic's Point Blank pack adding weapons from the anime Gun Gale Online
body:
![wallpaper](https://i.imgur.com/1aTepCS.png)


This is an official extension pack for Vic's Point Blank that adds weapons from the Sword Art Online anime spin-off: Gun Gale Online.



The pack includes real-world weapons, stylized ones, and sci-fi ones featured in the anime.

Content added:

- Five-SeveN (handgun)
- P-Chan (P90 pink vers.)
- Migita (A 6-round grenade launcher)
- PGM Ultima Ratio Hecate II (.50 BMG sniper)
- Kagemitsu G4 (Beam saber melee weapon, looks best with Complimentary shaders)
- Sirius-2 (Laser gun)
- HG Rail (Attachment that allows you to put scopes on handguns)

(See gallery for images)

More weapons will be added in the future.



Pack requires version 1.9.6+ of VPB to work.

![wallpaper](https://i.imgur.com/4RIH57a.png)

Locate your directory--the same place where your mods folder, your resource packs folder, saves, etc. are at. Create a new folder in there called 'pointblank'

Inside this folder, put the content pack zip file you installed. You can have as many content packs in there as you want.

![wallpaper](https://i.imgur.com/nc9WLAi.png)

Done!

Once you load the game, the content pack will be installed. This process also works for installing content pack on servers. Be advised that players joining a server will also need to install the same content packs.
